+
+The new `/commit` command guides through project-specific commit workflows, checking CLAUDE.md for requirements like changelog entries and version bumps.

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+---
+description: Commit changes with project-specific workflows
+---
+
+# Commit Changes
+
+## 1. Gather context
+
+Run `git status`, `git diff`, and `git log --oneline -5` to understand changes.
+
+## 2. Check project requirements
+
+Identify any project-specific commit requirements, such as:
+
+- Changelog entries
+- Version bumps
+- Validation steps
+
+Fulfill all requirements before committing. Do not skip steps.
+
+## 3. Stage and commit
+
+Stage changes and commit following the `writing-commit-messages` skill.
+
+If it's unclear whether to amend the last commit or create a new one, ask the user.
